headline: Is Ford Planning to Sell Part of Its Spain Plant to Geely?
summary: F is reportedly in advanced talks to sell part of its Valencia plant to Geely, a move that could support a new EV project in Europe.

headline: Ford CFO sounds the alarm on surging aluminum prices
summary: When you stand in a showroom kicking the tires on a new pickup, you are not really thinking about metallurgy. You are thinking about the monthly payment, the towing capacity, the trade-in value of your old car. The truck itself feels like one solid object. Bumper to bumper, you assume the price is ...

headline: Geely agrees deal for part of Ford Valencia plant – report
summary: Spanish trade publication La Tribuna de Automoción, citing unnamed industry sources, reported that Geely has reached an agreement to purchase the Body 3 assembly hall at Ford’s Almussafes site.

raw.headline: Geely agrees deal for part of Ford Valencia plant – report
raw.summary: Spanish trade publication La Tribuna de Automoción, citing unnamed industry sources, reported that Geely has reached an agreement to purchase the Body 3 assembly hall at Ford’s Almussafes site.

headline: BWXT Announces $1.4 Billion in Contracts for Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program
summary: LYNCHBURG, Va., May 07, 2026--BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) announced today the award of U.S. Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program contracts totaling more than $1.4 billion.
